title: Document local launch in runbook — add dedicated section to docs/engineering/runbook.md
description: Add a dedicated section to docs/engineering/runbook.md documenting the local agent-driven Categorizer launch. Must include: prerequisites (Docker + Compose, .env populated), launch command, health URL (http://localhost:3001/), poll cadence (2s/60s), stop command, direct port binding note (no Traefik), cross-references to user guide US-0006 and architecture US-0006. No production content modified.
notes: Document ephemeral / agent-driven nature. Note: production deployment unaffected (categorizer.omniflow.cc via parent stack). Note: Cursor browser MCP reaches localhost:3001 without restriction (R-0023 Q6).
